title: Aranet Consolidated Multi-Threshold Alerting to Reduce Fatigue
app: Custom HEC or scripted input from Aranet Cloud API / Aranet PRO base station
spl:
index=environment sourcetype="aranet:sensor" earliest=-1h
| eval co2=tonumber(coalesce(co2_ppm, ""))
| eval temp=tonumber(coalesce(temp_c, ""))
| eval rh=tonumber(coalesce(humidity_pct, ""))
| eval sev=case(co2>=5000 OR temp>30 OR temp<10,3, co2>=1000 OR rh<35 OR rh>65 OR abs(temp-22)>3,2, 1=1,0)
| where sev>0
| stats max(sev) as max_severity dc(sensor_id) as sensor_count values(sensor_id) as sensors by location
description: Multiple single-metric alerts page teams unnecessarily; one consolidated incident per room preserves signal.
value: Cuts pager noise while maintaining coverage.
implementation: (1) Define severity matrix. (2) Deduplicate 15-minute window. (3) Route sev3 to voice, sev2 to chat.
visualization: Table consolidated incidents; SLA to ack.
grandmaExplanation: We combine room alerts into one notice so people are not spammed.
